overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia exploring a mountainous region. The clip begins near ancient stone ruins under overcast skies, then transitions to a bright coastal overlook with a wooden bridge, continuing along a scenic cliffside path with panoramic views of islands and distant mountains across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain path near ancient stone ruins

events.description: screen fades to black indicating a location or time transition

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking past stone ruins and looking toward the snowy mountain peak in the distance

entered.detail: ancient stone doorway with dark entrance partially covered by vines
massive boulder adjacent to the ruin entrance
tall mountain with snow-covered summit visible in the background
scattered evergreen trees on the hillside

segments.scene_description: Geralt stands near ancient stone ruins on a mountain path under overcast skies. He walks past the ruin entrance toward a snow-capped peak visible in the distance, with pine trees dotting the landscape. The scene fades to black as he continues along the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden overlook bridge on coastal cliff

events.description: fade from black reveals bright coastal overlook with wooden bridge and panoramic water views
Geralt steps onto the wooden bridge structure crossing a small ravine

agents.ego_description: Geralt approaching and crossing a wooden bridge overlooking a vast lake with scattered islands and distant settlements

entered.detail: weathered wooden plank bridge with simple railings spanning a coastal ravine
steep rocky cliff face dropping down to the water below
cluster of buildings on an island across the water with a prominent tower
snow-capped mountain rising from the water in the far distance
weathered wooden post with directional signs near the bridge entrance

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a bright, sunny coastal overlook. Geralt walks across a weathered wooden bridge spanning a ravine, with stunning views of islands and settlements across the calm water. A wooden signpost stands near the bridge entrance as he crosses toward the cliffside path.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliffside trail with panoramic water views

events.description: exits wooden bridge onto dirt trail continuing along the cliff edge
passing a low stone wall running alongside the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the coastal path with the sun at his back, overlooking the calm water and distant islands

entered.detail: low stacked stone wall running parallel to the trail on the inland side
tall thin spire visible on the horizon across the water
large boulders and rocky formations along the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: Geralt continues along a winding dirt trail cut into the coastal cliffside. The path is bordered by a low stone wall on the left and drops off to the water on the right. The sun shines brightly overhead as he walks toward a distant tower structure visible across the water, passing scattered rocky outcrops along the way.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rugged mountain path that leads from ancient ruins toward a distant, frozen peak. It begins with Geralt standing beside weathered stone ruins under a heavy, overcast sky. As he moves forward, the camera tracks his progress past the ruin entrance and deeper into a landscape dotted with pine trees. The scene then opens up to reveal a snow-capped mountain looming in the distance before the view gradually fades to black as he continues his journey along the trail.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunny coastal overlook onto a winding cliffside trail. It begins with Geralt crossing a weathered wooden bridge over a ravine, passing a wooden signpost while islands and settlements are visible across the calm water. As he reaches the other side, the scene shifts to a dirt path cut into the coastal cliffside, bordered by a low stone wall. The camera then tracks along this trail under a bright overhead sun, passing scattered rocky outcrops. The movement finally leads toward a distant tower structure visible across the water as the path winds further along the coast.
